name: Choosing What Content to Create: from AI to Google's Helpful Content Update With Amy Aitman
episode_summary: Amy Aitman is a content operations executive with two decades of communications, marketing, and content strategy experience. Currently the COO for Venture 4th Media, a multi-million dollar content brand portfolio, specializing in building and growing digital assets. She focuses on scaling authentic content teams and content operations with plenty of E-E-A-T in every niche. She also shares her insights on Content Forward.
episode_summary_rich_text:
On this week's episode, authenticity isn't just a buzzword. For Amy Aitman, authenticity is at the center of creating great, rank-worthy content. Here's what you'll learn:

  • How to build a content team of subject experts versus generic content writers
  • Why users love niche content (it's all in the details)
  • How to speak the same language as your readers while maintaining rankings

‍
